notes: Page-level relevance for long clean PDFs (Profit Ability 2, Effectiveness in Context, Media in Focus, Giving Attention). Title-only (pages: null) for short thematic PDFs whose per-page text is dominated by repeated nav/TOC (The Value of TV, From Good to Great, TV is at the Heart of Effectiveness) and for scraped sources with synthetic page numbers (As Seen on TV, Signalling Success, Payback Studies, Demand Generator, TV Viewing Report 2025). Labels bootstrapped from retrieval and reviewed against source pages.
